declared.title: OONI Analysis on the Blocking of the X Social Media Platform in Tanzania
declared.selection_rationale: First document processed by the ingestion pipeline (walking-skeleton milestone — see docs/PROJECT_CONTINUITY.md Section 6a). Also a genuine fit for the corpus on its own merits, independent of that: OONI is an approved v1 source, Tanzania is a target country, mid-2025 is inside the 2022-2025 window, and it documents a specific dated censorship event (blocking of X) with technical network-measurement evidence — exactly the kind of source-cited claim the assistant is meant to answer questions about. Originally pointed at the PDF version of this report under ooni.org/documents/; switched to this HTML companion post after the PDF path turned out to sit behind a JS-based bot challenge (Fable-consulted design question — see decisionlog.md, 2026-07-13) that a scripted client can't pass, while this HTML write-up covers the same finding and is openly accessible.
